apigateway.stage.CfnAbout: The `AWS::ApiGateway::Stage` resource creates a stage for a deployment.

apigateway.stage.AccessLogSetting.Description: Specifies settings for logging access in this stage.

apigateway.stage.CacheClusterEnabled.Description: Indicates whether cache clustering is enabled for the stage.

apigateway.stage.CanarySetting.Description: Specifies settings for the canary deployment in this stage.

apigateway.stage.ClientCertificateId.Description: The ID of the client certificate that API Gateway uses to call your integration endpoints in the stage.

apigateway.stage.DeploymentId.Description: The ID of the deployment that the stage is associated with. This parameter is required to create a stage.

apigateway.stage.DocumentationVersion.Description: The version ID of the API documentation snapshot.

apigateway.stage.MethodSettings.Description: Settings for all methods in the stage.

apigateway.stage.RestApiId.Description: The ID of the `RestApi` resource that you're deploying with this stage.

apigateway.stage.StageName.Description: The name of the stage, which API Gateway uses as the first path segment in the invoked Uniform Resource Identifier (URI).

apigateway.stage.Tags.Description: An array of arbitrary tags (key-value pairs) to associate with the stage.

apigateway.stage.TracingEnabled.Description: Specifies whether active X-Ray tracing is enabled for this stage.  For more information, see [Trace API Gateway API Execution with AWS X-Ray](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/apigateway/latest/developerguide/apigateway-xray.html) in the *API Gateway Developer Guide*.

apigateway.stage.Variables.Description: A map (string-to-string map) that defines the stage variables, where the variable name is the key and the variable value is the value. Variable names are limited to alphanumeric characters. Values must match the following regular expression: `[A-Za-z0-9-._~:/?#&=,]+`.
